description: User dwells on the prompt screen asking 'I hear you. What are you going to do next?' while the cursor remains stationary at the bottom of the screen.
frame_description: A dark overlay screen with a prompt and 'Open' button.

description: The screen momentarily goes black, indicating a UI transition or loading state.
User continues to dwell on the prompt screen after the UI reappears, with the cursor still stationary.
frame_description: The prompt screen with 'Open' and 'Repeat the task instructions' buttons is visible again.
